title: Greeting Chatbot
scenario: Design a chatbot persona for a retail store's greeting service. The target audience is customers aged 18-60. Create a character that would welcome customers, provide basic information, and offer assistance. Ensure the persona is 120 words or less.
constraints: Use a friendly and welcoming tone

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the persona have a friendly and welcoming tone?
Does the persona description adhere to the word limit and tone constraints?
Does the persona use a clear and concise language style?
